en: And the Virgin. Didn't even ask for anything.
I think he just likes to cause trouble. Now that's my kind of man.
ko: 그는 그냥 문제를 일으키는 걸 좋아하는 것 같아.

en: Here you are. The dominatrix who brought a nation to its knees.
ko: 한 나라를 무릎 꿇게 한 지배자.

en: I said no. Very, very close, but no.
You got carried away. The game was too elaborate.
You're enjoying yourself too much. No such thing as too much.
Oh, enjoying the thrill of the chase is fine. Craving the distraction of the game, I sympathize entirely, but sentiment.
Sentiment is a chemical defect found in the losing side. Sentiment?
ko: 감정은 패배한 쪽에서 발견되는 화학적 결함이야.

en: What are you talking about? You.
Oh, dear God. Look at the poor man.
You don't actually think I was interested in you. Why?
ko: 내가 너에게 관심이 있다고 생각하지는 않겠지.

en: Because you're the great Sherlock Holmes, the clever detective in the funny hat?
